content:
# Entity: Hon. Jenny L. McNeill

**Role:** 14th Circuit Judge — judicial misconduct target
**Lanes:** E (Misconduct), F (Appellate)
**Cases:** 2024-001507-DC, COA 366810
**Damages Range:** $150K–$1.5M
**Filings Against:** JTC complaint (98/100), MSC Superintending Control (90/100), MSC Mandamus (90/100), Federal §1983, Disqualification motion (88/100)
**Key Statistics:** 24 ex parte orders, 18.26% ex parte rate, 131 total orders, 1,127 documented violations
**Canons Violated:** 1, 2, 2A, 3(A)(4-5), 3(B)(2,5,7), 4
**Bias Evidence:** Ex parte rate 3.65x normal, 569+ days PT denied, 59 days jailed, $1,056.60/mo child support burden
